name: Micro Shift
explanation: A micro-pitch detune doubler that fattens and widens a source into a lush stereo double. Two pitch-shifted voices are detuned a few cents up and down (below a semitone), each given its own short delay tap, panned hard left/right and blended with the dry signal. Fractional delay-line pitch shifting keeps it smooth with no zipper noise. Controls: Detune (cent spread), Delay (tap time), Width (stereo spread), Feedback (subtle regen) and dry/wet Mix.
